overview: Azani Medical Spa provides aesthetic, anti-aging, and wellness care led by Dr. Monica Gavin (Bioidentical Hormone Replacement specialist) and plastic surgeon Dr. Benjamin Lam.
highlights: BHRT with regular bloodwork and monitoring
Aesthetic treatments: Botox, dermal fillers, laser, microneedling, and chemical peels
targetAudience: Patients seeking anti-aging care, hormone replacement, and aesthetic treatments in Lehigh Valley, Pennsylvania.
